PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Mar-28-2018 Continued To Apr-11-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Micheal Hall for Linda Gradwohl (Petitioner).

Mr. Hall stated that courtesy copies were provided, that the will is 56 years old and that he has not been able to locate any witnesses. Mr. Hall also stated that he has additional copies with him today, that he filed a declaration signed by his Client and that the Probate Examiner has had possession of the copies of the documents for two weeks. The Petititon for Letters of Administration is continued to April 11, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for the Court to take a look at the copies.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
